body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Imaginal** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Phase Imaginal bridge-v3 targeted acquisition.

**Discovery of EEG effective connectivity during visual motor imagery with multi-scale symbolic transfer entropy.** — Scientific reports (2025). PMID: 41174212. DOI: 10.1038/s41598-025-22143-7. Score: 48. Visual motor imagery (VMI) is an important component of motor imagery, with potential applications in brain-computer interfaces and motor rehabilitation due to its lower training cost compared to kinesthetic motor imagery (KMI). However, the neural mechanisms underlying VMI, particularly the effects of imagery hand and imagery perspective (first-person perspective, 1pp, vs. third-person perspective, 3pp) remain unclear.
